_comment: Branded combo line as executed by ygo-env engine (seed 18, Branded.ydk). Engine deviations from TCG noted below.
_engine_notes: Cartesia has no Lua script — acts as dumb fusion material only, no effects
Fallen of the White Dragon and Fallen of Albaz do NOT appear in Branded Fusion material list (engine quirk)
Gold Sarcophagus appears as second fusion material instead (engine quirk — all deck cards pooled)
Granguignol (Level 8) is filtered out of Albion's re-fusion targets by IsLevelBelow(8) in Albion Lua
Mirrorjade used instead of Granguignol as closest available Fusion target
Alba-Lenatus sent to GY as cost for Mirrorjade's quick effect (no valid opponent targets in solitaire)
_status: complete (engine-actual path). Does NOT match TCG intended combo due to engine Lua limitations.
_tcg_intended: Branded Fusion → send FotWD+Cartesia → Albion → banish FotWD+Cartesia → Granguignol → ...
name: Branded Fusion Line (Engine-Actual)

steps.label: Place → s1
steps._note: Place Branded Fusion in spell zone s1

steps.label: Select Albion the Branded Dragon
steps._note: Choose Albion the Branded Dragon as fusion summon target

steps.label: Select Blazing Cartesia, the Virtuous
steps._note: Select Cartesia from deck as first fusion material

steps.label: Select Gold Sarcophagus
steps._note: Engine quirk: Gold Sarcophagus appears as second material (TCG intended: Fallen of the White Dragon)

steps.label: Place → m1
steps._note: Place Albion the Branded Dragon in monster zone m1

steps.label: Yes (Albion the Branded Dragon)
steps._note: Activate Albion's trigger effect: re-fusion summon using banished materials

steps.label: Select Mirrorjade the Iceblade Dragon
steps._note: Target for re-fusion. TCG intended: Granguignol (Level 8 filtered out by Albion Lua)

steps.label: Select Albion the Branded Dragon
steps._note: Use Albion (on field) as sole material for Mirrorjade re-fusion

steps.label: Place → m1
steps._note: Place Mirrorjade in monster zone m1

steps.label: Select Alba-Lenatus the Abyss Dragon
steps._note: Mirrorjade quick effect cost: send Alba-Lenatus from extra deck to GY
